heading: Proven Business Impact
subhead: Every number below maps to a specific project, client, and year. Full details in the CV.

items.title: EUR 1.1M+ Documented Savings
items.desc: Aggregated across 14+ years at SWIFT, NTT, BT, T-Systems — license consolidation (EUR 500k+ at NTT), automation ROI, and waste elimination. Each line item traceable to a named project.

items.title: 60% Documentation Time Saved
items.desc: Built an AI-assisted documentation workflow at S.W.I.F.T. ingesting source code + API specs — produced trusted, management-friendly technical docs that engineering, product and audit signed off without rework.

items.title: 50% Incident Volume Cut
items.desc: Redesigned BT hung-line ITSM process — halved firefighting and shifted the team from reactive to proactive.

items.title: 15+ FTE Freed via Automation
items.desc: Automated internal ticket-quality workflow at BT — USD 100k+ annual run-rate saving, 10-FTE headcount redirection to strategic work.

items.title: 21% Higher Tool Adoption
items.desc: Drove PEGA workflow adoption at BT via targeted stakeholder engagement — turned a rollout into actual usage.

items.title: 50% API Reduction (projected)
items.desc: Leading E-form optimization and endpoint consolidation at S.W.I.F.T. (2025-present) — cutting complexity and maintenance cost.
